note: Baseline report IDs and metric values for current stable artifacts. These are the reference points for non-regression budgets. PR 4 of #21 freezes these; subsequent PRs must not regress beyond the budgets defined in budgets.json. When a new stable artifact is promoted, its baseline report ID is added here.

stable_baselines.note: Initial placeholder. The actual baseline is frozen when the first complete quality + runtime report is produced on the stable artifact. Until then, the initial promotion policy from issue #21 applies.
